description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-menu. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-menu-item** AND **hx-menu-divider** (`hx-menu/hx-menu-item.ts`, `hx-menu/hx-menu-divider.ts`). These are registered custom elements that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip them.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on ALL THREE: hx-menu, hx-menu-item, hx-menu-divider. Verify ARIA roles (menu/menuitem/separator pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End, Enter/Space, Escape), screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-menu-item and hx-menu-divider APIs too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports ALL THREE elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/` (includes hx-menu-item.ts, hx-menu-divider.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-menu.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (parent AND both sub-components)
- Doc page complete per template (all sub-component APIs documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (all three elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-menu

descriptionHistory.description: Launch readiness audit for hx-menu. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, menu role, arrow key navigation, WCAG 2.1 AA. (2) Astro doc page — all 12 template sections. (3) Individual export — standalone HTML works. (4) `npm run verify` passes. Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-menu.md`

Launch readiness audit for hx-menu. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-menu-item** AND **hx-menu-divider** (`hx-menu/hx-menu-item.ts`, `hx-menu/hx-menu-divider.ts`). These are registered custom elements that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip them.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on ALL THREE: hx-menu, hx-menu-item, hx-menu-divider. Verify ARIA roles (menu/menuitem/separator pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End, Enter/Space, Escape), screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-menu-item and hx-menu-divider APIs too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports ALL THREE elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/` (includes hx-menu-item.ts, hx-menu-divider.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-menu.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (parent AND both sub-components)
- Doc page complete per template (all sub-component APIs documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (all three elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes

"/Volumes/Development/booked/helix/.worktrees/feature-launch-ready-hx-menu/packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/hx-menu-item.styles.ts" } 🔧 Tool: Write Input: { "file_path": "/Volumes/Development/booked/helix/.worktrees/feature-launch-ready-hx-menu/apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-menu.mdx", "content": "--- title: 'hx-menu' description: 'Keyboard-navigable context menu container for a set of actionable menu items, with full WAI-ARIA APG compliance.' --- import ComponentLoader from '../../../components/ComponentLoader.astro'; import ComponentDemo from '../../../components/ComponentDemo.astro'; import ComponentDoc from '../../../components/ComponentDoc.astro'; ## Overview `hx-menu` is the container element for a keyboard-navigable list of menu items. It implements the [WAI-ARIA APG Menu pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/menu/), providing full Arrow key navigation, Home/End focus management, typeahead search, and Escape-to-close behavior. Use `hx-menu` with `hx-menu-item` for interactive actions and `hx-menu-divider` to visually separate groups of related items. **Use `hx-menu` when:** presenting a list of contextual actions the user can trigger (e.g., a context menu, an action dropdown, or an overflow actions panel). **Use `hx-dropdown` instead when:** the trigger and positioning are managed automatically by the component. ## Live Demo ### Basic Menu Edit Duplicate Delete ### With Prefix Icons + New File 📂 Open 💾 Save ✕ Close ### Checkbox Items Show Sidebar Show Toolbar Show Status Bar ### Radio Items Sort by Name Sort by Date Sort by Size ### With Keyboard Shortcuts (Suffix) Cut Ctrl+X Copy Ctrl+C Paste Ctrl+V ### Loading State Saving... Export ## Installation ```bash # Full library npm install @helix/library # Or import only this component (tree-shaking friendly) import '@helix/library/components/hx-menu'; ``` ## Basic Usage ```html Edit Duplicate Delete ``` ## Properties `hx-menu` has no declarative properties. Use `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby` to provide an accessible name. | Method | Signature | Description | | -------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------ | | `focusFirst()` | `() => void` | Programmatically focus the first enabled item. | | `focusLast()` | `() => void` | Programmatically focus the last enabled item. | ## Events | Event | Detail Type | Description | | ----------- | ------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | `hx-select` | `{ item: HelixMenuItem, value: string }` | Fired when an item is activated via click or keyboard. | | `hx-close` | `void` | Fired when the Escape key is pressed inside the menu. | ## CSS Custom Properties | Property | Default | Description | | --------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ---------------------------- | | `--hx-menu-bg` | `var(--hx-color-neutral-0)` | Menu background color. | | `--hx-menu-border-color` | `var(--hx-color-neutral-200)` | Menu border color. | | `--hx-menu-border-radius` | `var(--hx-border-radius-md)` | Menu corner radius. | | `--hx-menu-shadow` | `0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1)` | Menu box shadow. | | `--hx-menu-min-width` | `10rem` | Minimum menu width. | ## CSS Parts | Part | Description | | ------ | ------------------------------ | | `base` | The root `
` element. | ## Slots | Slot | Description | | ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | _(default)_ | Accepts `hx-menu-item` and `hx-menu-divider` elements. A console warning is emitted if unexpected elements are slotted. | ## Keyboard Navigation | Key | Behavior | | ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------- | | `ArrowDown` | Move focus to the next enabled item; wraps to first. | | `ArrowUp` | Move focus to the previous enabled item; wraps to last. | | `Home` | Move focus to the first enabled item. | | `End` | Move focus to the last enabled item. | | `Enter` | Activate the focused item. | | `Space` | Activate the focused item. | | `Escape` | Fires `hx-close` — the consuming component should close the menu. | | Printable characters | Typeahead: jump to first item whose label starts with the typed characters. Buffer resets after 500 ms. | ## Accessibility | Topic | Details | | ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | ARIA role | `role="menu"` on the inner container. Conforms to WAI-ARIA APG Menu pattern. | | Accessible name | Supply `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby` on `` to name the menu for screen readers. | | Keyboard | Full Arrow / Home / End / Enter / Space / Escape / typeahead per WAI-ARIA APG. | | Screen reader | Item selection is announced by role (`menuitem`, `menuitemcheckbox`, `menuitemradio`). `aria-checked` state changes are announced automatically. | | Focus | `focusFirst()` and `focusLast()` are available for programmatic focus on menu open. | | Disabled items | Disabled items are excluded from keyboard navigation entirely. | | Loading items | Loading items are excluded from keyboard navigation; `aria-busy="true"` is set on the item. | ## Drupal Integration ```twig {# my-module/templates/action-menu.html.twig #} {% for item in items %} {% if item.divider %} {% else %} {{ item.label }} {% endif %} {% endfor %} ``` Load the library in your module's `.libraries.yml`: ```yaml helix-components: js: /libraries/helix/helix.min.js: { minified: true } ``` Listen for events in Drupal behaviors using `once()`: ```javascript Drupal.behaviors.helixMenu = { attach(context) { once('helixMenu', 'hx-menu', context).forEach((menu) => { menu.addEventListener('hx-select', (e) => { const { value } = e.detail; // handle selection }); menu.addEventListener('hx-close', () => { // hide the menu }); }); }, }; ``` ## Standalone HTML Example ```html hx-menu example Edit Duplicate Delete ``` ## Sub-components This family includes three elements that work together: | Component | Purpose | | ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | | `hx-menu` | The container. Manages keyboard navigation and events. | | `hx-menu-item` | An interactive item. Supports normal, checkbox, and radio types. | | `hx-menu-divider`| A visual horizontal separator between groups of items. | See [`hx-menu-item`](/component-library/hx-menu-item/) and [`hx-menu-divider`](/component-library/hx-menu-divider/) for their individual API references. ## API Reference " } 🔧 Tool: Write Input: { "file_path": "/Volumes/Development/booked/helix/.worktrees/feature-launch-ready-hx-menu/apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-menu-item.mdx", "content": "--- title: 'hx-menu-item' description: 'Interactive item within an hx-menu with optional icon slots, keyboard shortcuts, checkbox/radio types, loading state, and submenu support.' --- import ComponentLoader from '../../../components/ComponentLoader.astro'; import ComponentDemo from '../../../components/ComponentDemo.astro'; import ComponentDoc from '../../../components/ComponentDoc.astro'; ## Overview `hx-menu-item` is the interactive item element for use inside `hx-menu`. It supports three operational types (`normal`, `checkbox`, `radio`), a loading state with animated spinner, prefix/suffix icon slots for shortcut display, and an optional nested `hx-menu` for submenu patterns. Always place `hx-menu-item` as a direct child of `hx-menu`. Never use it standalone outside of a menu context. ## Live Demo ### Item Types Normal item Checkbox item Radio item ### States Enabled Disabled Loading... ### With Prefix and Suffix 💾 Save Ctrl+S 🖨 Print Ctrl+P ## Installation ```bash # Full library (includes hx-menu-item) npm install @helix/library # Or import only the menu family import '@helix/library/components/hx-menu'; ``` ## Basic Usage ```html Edit Delete ``` ## Properties | Property | Attribute | Type | Default | Description | | ---------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | | `value` | `value` | `string` | `''` | The value emitted in the `hx-select` event detail when this item is activated. | | `disabled` | `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Prevents interaction and removes the item from keyboard navigation. | | `checked` | `checked` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether this item is checked. Meaningful only when `type` is `checkbox` or `radio`. | | `type` | `type` | `'normal' \| 'checkbox' \| 'radio'` | `'normal'` | Controls the ARIA role and checked-state behavior. `checkbox` toggles on activation; `radio` performs mutual exclusion within the parent `hx-menu`. | | `loading` | `loading` | `boolean` | `false` | Shows an animated spinner and prevents interaction. Sets `aria-busy="true"`. | ## Events | Event | Detail Type | Description | | ---------------------- | ---------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | `hx-item-select` | `{ item: HelixMenuItem, value: string }` | Fired when the item is activated via click, Enter, or Space. Bubbles and is composed. Captured and re-emitted as `hx-select` by the parent `hx-menu`. | | `hx-item-submenu-open` | `{ item: HelixMenuItem }` | Fired when `ArrowRight` is pressed on an item that has content in the `submenu` slot. | ## CSS Custom Properties | Property | Default | Description | | ---------------------------- | -------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | | `--hx-menu-item-color` | `var(--hx-color-neutral-900)` | Item text color. | | `--hx-menu-item-hover-bg` | `var(--hx-color-neutral-100)` | Background color on hover and `:focus-visible`. | ## CSS Parts | Part | Description | | --------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | | `base` | The root interactive `
` with ARIA role applied. | | `prefix` | Wrapper `` for the `prefix` slot. | | `label` | Wrapper `` for the default (label) slot. | | `suffix` | Wrapper `` for the `suffix` slot. | | `checked-icon` | Wrapper `` containing the checkmark SVG. Present only when `type` is `checkbox` or `radio`. | | `submenu-icon` | Wrapper `` containing the chevron SVG. Present only when the `submenu` slot is populated. | ## Slots | Slot | Description | | ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | _(default)_ | The item label text or content. | | `prefix` | Icon or content rendered before the label (e.g., action icon). | | `suffix` | Shortcut label or icon rendered after the label (e.g., `Ctrl+S`). | | `submenu` | A nested `hx-menu` element. When populated, adds a chevron icon and triggers `hx-item-submenu-open` on `ArrowRight`. | ## Accessibility | Topic | Details | | ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | ARIA role | `menuitem` by default; `menuitemcheckbox` when `type="checkbox"`; `menuitemradio` when `type="radio"`. | | `aria-disabled` | Set to `"true"` when `disabled` is active. The element remains in the DOM but is excluded from keyboard navigation by `hx-menu`. | | `aria-checked` | Set to `"true"` or `"false"` when `type` is `checkbox` or `radio`. Omitted for `normal` items. | | `aria-haspopup` | Set to `"true"` when the `submenu` slot has content. | | `aria-busy` | Set to `"true"` when `loading` is active. | | `tabindex` | `"0"` when enabled; `"-1"` when disabled. Focus is managed programmatically by `hx-menu`. | | Keyboard | `Enter` / `Space` activate the item. `ArrowRight` on items with a submenu fires `hx-item-submenu-open`. | | SVG icons | Checkmark and chevron SVGs are `aria-hidden="true"` — decorative only. | | Spinner | The loading spinner SVG is `aria-hidden="true"`; state is announced via `aria-busy`. | | Reduced motion | Spinner animation is disabled when `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` is set. | ## Drupal Integration ```twig {# my-module/templates/menu-item.html.twig #} {% if item.icon %} {{ item.icon }} {% endif %} {{ item.label }} {% if item.shortcut %} {{ item.shortcut }} {% endif %} ``` Listen for events in Drupal behaviors: ```javascript Drupal.behaviors.helixMenuItem = { attach(context) { once('helixMenuItem', 'hx-menu', context).forEach((menu) => { menu.addEventListener('hx-select', (e) => { const { value, item } = e.detail; // item is the HelixMenuItem element; value is the string value }); }); }, }; ``` ## Standalone HTML Example ```html hx-menu-item example 📋 View Record 📅 Schedule Appointment 💾 Export CSV Email Notifications
``` ## API Reference " } 🔧 Tool: Write Input: { "file_path": "/Volumes/Development/booked/helix/.worktrees/feature-launch-ready-hx-menu/apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-menu-divider.mdx", "content": "--- title: 'hx-menu-divider' description: 'Visual horizontal separator for grouping related items within an hx-menu.' --- import ComponentLoader from '../../../components/ComponentLoader.astro'; import ComponentDemo from '../../../components/ComponentDemo.astro'; import ComponentDoc from '../../../components/ComponentDoc.astro'; ## Overview `hx-menu-divider` is a visual horizontal separator for use inside `hx-menu`. It applies `role="separator"` and `aria-orientation="horizontal"` to meet WAI-ARIA APG requirements, so screen readers announce it as a section boundary when navigating through menu items. Always place `hx-menu-divider` as a direct child of `hx-menu`, between logical groups of `hx-menu-item` elements. ## Live Demo Undo Redo Cut Copy Paste Select All ## Installation ```bash # Full library (includes hx-menu-divider) npm install @helix/library # Or import the menu family import '@helix/library/components/hx-menu'; ``` ## Basic Usage ```html Edit Delete ``` ## Properties `hx-menu-divider` has no properties. It is a purely presentational separator. ## Events `hx-menu-divider` does not dispatch any events. ## CSS Custom Properties | Property | Default | Description | | ------------------------- | ----------------------------- | -------------------------- | | `--hx-menu-divider-color` | `var(--hx-color-neutral-200)` | Color of the divider line. | ## CSS Parts | Part | Description | | ------ | ---------------------------------------------- | | `base` | The root `
` element. | ## Slots `hx-menu-divider` has no slots. ## Accessibility | Topic | Details | | ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | ARIA role | `role="separator"` — announces a section boundary between menu items. | | Orientation | `aria-orientation="horizontal"` is set automatically. | | Keyboard | Not focusable. The divider is skipped by `hx-menu`'s keyboard navigation logic. | | Screen reader | Announced as a separator when a screen reader reads through the menu sequentially. | ## Drupal Integration ```twig {# Render a divider between item groups #} {% for group in item_groups %} {% for item in group %} {{ item.label }} {% endfor %} {% if not loop.last %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} ``` Load the library in your module's `.libraries.yml`: ```yaml helix-components: js: /libraries/helix/helix.min.js: { minified: true } ``` ## Standalone HTML Example ```html hx-menu-divider example View Record Edit Record Print Summary Export to PDF Archive ``` ## API Reference " } 🔧 Tool: Bash Input: { "command": "npm run verify 2>&1", "description": "Run full verify gate (lint + format:check + type-check)",
